Nationwide lacks a defined overarching data reconciliation process for regulatory compliance and governance.
context: None of the 19 SMEs consulted could identify the overarching Data Reconciliation process employed by Nationwide from a Data Governance perspective, specially for Regulatory Compliance.

description: Nationwide operates with fragmented data governance policies and processes.
context: Further improvement needed across Nationwide on how best to define Data Reconciliation policies, processes and governance framework as multiple instances of disconnected observed.

description: Nationwide requires a defined scope and action plan to address gaps in payment screening reconciliation.
context: Apparent lack of action plan and strategy to address 3rd Party Audit report findings about absence of data reconciliation process in Payment Screening area...

description: The Data Reconciliation Process is designed to establish the missing end-to-end reconciliation framework.
context: None of the 19 SMEs consulted could identify the overarching Data Reconciliation process employed by Nationwide from a Data Governance perspective, specially for Regulatory Compliance.

description: The process provides structured policies and governance frameworks to unify disconnected instances.
context: Further improvement needed across Nationwide on how best to define Data Reconciliation policies, processes and governance framework as multiple instances of disconnected observed.

description: The reconciliation process is applied to the payment screening functional area to monitor transactional activities.

properties.coverage: all customers, products, lines of business

context: Apparent lack of action plan and strategy to address 3rd Party Audit report findings about absence of data reconciliation process in Payment Screening area to confirm monitoring of all transactional activities...

description: FCTP Screening is the functional solution deployed to handle payment screening operations.
context: Referred artifacts "FCTP - Screening - Decision" in Confluence, dated July 12, 2023, as "Payment Screening: No reconciliation / evidence exists to confirm that all of the payments that need to be screened..."

description: FCTP Screening relies on HLS as the central filter server for payment screening operations.
context: Referred artifacts "FCTP - Screening - Decision" in Confluence... "Payment Screening: No reconciliation / evidence exists to confirm that all of the payments that need to be screened by HLS are sent to the various payment systems..."

description: HLS connects with the Chaos payment service for data lineage and transaction routing.
context: Ongoing Data Lineage exercise revealed connection between various payment services like Chaos, Swift, SEPA, First Payment, Visa Fund Fast Funds and Filter Server (HLS).

description: HLS connects with the Swift payment service for data lineage and transaction routing.

description: HLS connects with the First Payment service for data lineage and transaction routing.
context: Ongoing Data Lineage exercise revealed connection between various payment services like Chaos, Swift, SEPA, First Payment, Visa Fund Fast Funds and Filter Server (HLS).

description: HLS connects with the Visa Fund Fast Funds service for data lineage and transaction routing.
context: Ongoing Data Lineage exercise revealed connection between various payment services like Chaos, Swift, SEPA, First Payment, Visa Fund Fast Funds and Filter Server (HLS).

description: FCTP Screening artifacts and decisions were formally documented and released on the specified date.
context: Referred artifacts "FCTP - Screening - Decision" in Confluence, dated July 12, 2023, as "Payment Screening: No reconciliation / evidence exists..."

description: The payment screening use case relies on HLS to filter and route transactions across channels.
context: If the products across channels are sending all the required transaction to HLS.

description: Nationwide is subject to and addresses findings from a third-party audit report.
context: Apparent lack of action plan and strategy to address 3rd Party Audit report findings about absence of data reconciliation process in Payment Screening area...

description: The payment screening functional area currently lacks a defined scope for value-to-value comparison.
context: In the Screening functional area, titled 'Payment Screening Data Reconciliation BRD', it is indicated that the scope is yet to be defined, specifically highlighting a 'Value to Value' comparison from the Source System to the Target System.

description: The reconciliation process is designed to define the scope and establish value-to-value comparisons for payment screening.
context: In the Screening functional area, titled 'Payment Screening Data Reconciliation BRD', it is indicated that the scope is yet to be defined, specifically highlighting a 'Value to Value' comparison from the Source System to the Target System.

The assessment report involves the FCTP organization as the primary subject and beneficiary.
context: FCTP DR Assessment Report | 9th February 2024

description: The business control framework comprises data reconciliation controls and checks to ensure data integrity.
context: Data Reconciliation Controls and Checks

description: The business control framework comprises interface level key controls for system audit and error handling.
context: Interface Level Key Controls (applicable for all CDEs):

description: The business control framework comprises country of origin data maintenance to prevent unauthorized modifications.
context: The ‘Country of Origin’ data element must be maintained in its original state from the point of entry into the system through to its utilization in the risk rating system within the CDD system.

description: Maintaining accurate country of origin data enables effective customer due diligence processes.
context: FCTP CDE “Country Of Origin” as derived from CDD (Customer Due Diligence) output

description: The business control framework is applicable to the customer due diligence system environment.
context: within the CDD system

description: The business control framework is demonstrated and documented at the FCTP DR Assessment Report.
context: FCTP DR Assessment Report | 9th February 2024

description: The business control framework is targeted for the FCTP organization to govern data controls.
context: FCTP DR Assessment Report

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the EDB technology at the source system level.
context: EDB (CAO/SAO) ... Country of birth

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the SAMM technology during webservice transmission.
context: SAMM ... countryOfBirth ... Webservice (PUT)

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the PLPOS technology for applicant data processing.
context: PLPOS ... CountryOfBirthCode ... Applicant table

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the Summit technology for customer personal details.
context: Summit(TMW) ... Country of birth ... Cust_personal_details

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the CIS technology at the ODS/database level.
context: CIS (ODS) ... CIS (Database) ... Table : BA001 ... Column : COUBIRISO

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the IMAS technology for MLR historical data.
context: IMAS (MLR) ... Table : MLR_MCDD_HIST_ACC Column : BIRTH_COUNTRY_CD

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the NeRDE technology across inbound, feed, and transform schemas.
context: NeRDE (inbound file) ... NeRDE (Feed Schema) ... NeRDE(transform schema) ... NeRDE(IFS)

description: Data reconciliation controls are delivered via the Net Reveal Database at the final target storage stage.
context: Net Reveal Database ... Table : CUSTOMERS Column: COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN

description: EDB feeds into SAMM via webservice for country of birth data transmission.
context: EDB (CAO/SAO) ... Webservice (PUT) ... SAMM

description: SAMM feeds into PLPOS via webservice for country of birth code transmission.
context: SAMM ... Webservice (PUT) ... PLPOS

description: PLPOS feeds into Summit for applicant table data processing.
context: PLPOS ... Applicant table ... Summit(TMW)

description: Summit feeds into CIS for customer personal details and ODS data storage.
context: Summit(TMW) ... Cust_personal_details ... CIS (ODS)

description: CIS feeds into IMAS for MLR historical data processing.
context: CIS (ODS) ... CIS (Database) ... IMAS (MLR)

description: IMAS feeds into NeRDE via inbound file for CDD data extraction.
context: IMAS (MLR) ... NeRDE (inbound file)

description: NeRDE feeds into Net Reveal Database via transform/IFS for final customer data storage.
context: NeRDE(IFS) ... Net Reveal Database

description: Interface level key controls are delivered via the EDB technology interface for job control and error handling.
context: Interface Level Key Controls (applicable for all CDEs): 1. Every interface need to have job control (system audit, error threshold , altering & restart process) implemented

description: Interface level key controls are delivered via the Net Reveal Database interface for data mismatch alerting and logging.
context: Interface Level Key Controls (applicable for all CDEs): 2. In the event of any data or count mismatch ... the interface must halt data loading and trigger a alert. 3. A detailed log should be maintained for every loading operation
